channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to stop Meta’s AI image generator from using your Instagram photos
item.description: Meta's new AI image generator is using your public Instagram photos unless you opt out. Here's how to do that.

item.title: The Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3 is 'great value for those that just need a Windows computer' — and Argos just cut the price of this fuss-free business laptop
item.description: Honestly, I think this is the ideal no-fuss laptop for remote and hybrid workers.

item.title: These popular Tenda routers have an unpatched security backdoor which could give hackers access
item.description: CERT/CC finds a critical flaw in multiple Tenda routers, warning users to be careful.

item.title: Google’s Nest Thermostat has hit its best price of the year
item.description: If you’re looking for a relatively affordable way to cut down on cooling costs, Google’s Nest Thermostat can help. It’s packed with smart controls and energy-saving features, and right now it’s on sale in white for $79 ($50 off), which is its best price of the year, at Amazon. The smart thermostat is quick to […]

item.title: Universal is dropping a twisted new romance movie next month — and it’s perfect for fans of the horror hit Obsession
item.description: This new android centered thriller fits right in with the new trend of disturbing romance movies.

item.title: This UnionSine 16TB Desktop Hard Drive deal works out at less than $27 per TB and boasts up to 270MB/s transfer speeds
item.description: The desktop HDD features 16TB capacity, USB 3.0, and up to 270MB/s transfer speeds.

item.title: Meta’s new AI chips will begin production in September
item.description: The company is taking a modular approach to designing these chips, anticipating that their needs will change as AI evolves rapidly by the time the chips are in production.

item.title: Nvidia is a victim of the compute marketplace it created
item.description: Having proven how valuable compute can be, the company finds itself at the center of a market everyone wants to be in — while simpler technologies and less interesting companies get rich on the sidelines.

item.title: Microsoft’s patch Tuesdays are about to get bigger
item.description: Windows 11 updates could soon include fixes for more security issues at once. Microsoft said in a blog post on Thursday that it's now using AI to "identify potential issues earlier," which means "customers will see a higher volume of security updates included in each security release." Hackers, even amateurs, have increasingly been using AI […]

item.title: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.6 after government greenlight — and announces ‘ChatGPT Work’
item.description: About two weeks after OpenAI's GPT-5.6 was caught up in regulatory drama - rolled out only to government-approved organizations during a "limited preview" period - the company has received the Trump administration's greenlight for a public rollout of the model. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman called it "the best model we have ever produced." To celebrate, […]...

item.title: CEOs are being left baffled at the high cost of moving to AI — shockingly enough, sacking human workers isn't resulting in huge savings
item.description: Replacing human workers with AI isn't always the best decision, shockingly.

item.title: HP's 16-inch OmniBook 5 laptop with Ryzen AI 7 CPU, 16GB DDR5, and a 1TB SSD is nearly half price at Walmart
item.description: With an AMD Ryzen AI 7 processor and 16GB of DDR5 memory, the 16-inch HP OmniBook 5 is an easy recommendation from me.

item.title: The top 6 back-to-school mini PCs for college and university — as benchmarked by our computing team (and no, they won't wipe out your student loan either)
item.description: Power up for the school year.

item.title: 'All options are on the table, considering the drastic measure already put in place' — Could Microsoft sell Xbox? Analysts say it's too expensive for that, but that it could be dismantled piece by piece
item.description: Analysts suggest a Xbox would be too expensive for buyers, and it's more likely they would go after "specific pieces" of the company instead.

item.title: Meta lance Muse Spark 1.1, son premier modèle d’IA payant pour le code et les agents
item.description: Meta lance Muse Spark 1.1, un modèle de code et d’agents vendu très peu cher via une API payante. Un virage complet pour l’entreprise qui prônait l’open source, mais l’Europe reste sur le carreau.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 et Watch Ultra 2 : voici les prix français, ça va coûter plus cher
item.description: Les prix français des Galaxy Watch 9 et Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 de Samsung ont été dévoilés avant leur officialisation.

item.title: Meta’s super-sensing AI glasses are still in the works, and I don’t know if I should be excited or terrified
item.description: Is never forgetting anything ever again worth the cost of an always-watching AI? Meta certainly hopes so, as its super-sensing AI glasses edge one step closer to reality according to new report.

item.title: J’ai testé la Samsung HW-Q990H : la barre de son Dolby Atmos qui se rapproche plus que jamais d’un vrai home cinéma
item.description: Samsung affine plus qu'il ne révolutionne sa meilleure barre de son. La HW-Q990H conserve notamment son étonnant petit caisson de basses, l'un des plus performants que nous ayons testés, tout en promettant une scène sonore encore plus vaste et immersive.

item.title: Amazfit Active 3 Premium review — Premium performance, just without the price
item.description: The Amazfit Active 3 Premium just hit new heights for the manufacturer, and should have rivals looking over their shoulders.

item.title: Un agent IA GPT-5.6 Sol lui fait économiser 650 euros d’assurance pendant qu’il promène son chien
item.description: Un utilisateur raconte que GPT-5.6 Sol a comparé seul des dizaines d’assureurs, envoyé des e-mails et souscrit un nouveau contrat pendant qu’il promenait son chien. Bilan : 650 euros d’économie par an, et un aperçu de ce que les agents IA savent désormais faire à notre place.

item.title: The Gentlemen season 2 release date will arrive on Netflix just weeks before MobLand season 2 hits Paramount+ — as fans dub September 'Guy Ritchie month'
item.description: On the same day as MobLand confirms its schedule, Netflix has dropped the release date and trailer for The Gentlemen season 2.... and they're just weeks apart.

item.title: Après 3 200 licenciements chez Xbox, joueurs et développeurs se mobilisent en ligne
item.description: Les fans, joueurs et développeurs prennent la parole après l'annonce des licenciements chez Xbox.

item.title: Trump’s mixed messaging on Iran war has mediators rushing to save the ceasefire
item.description: Mistrust is mounting on both sides, raising the question of what comes next in the Iran war. President Donald Trump says he believes the ceasefire with Iran is over. He says he’s not sure he wants a deal anymore and says the U.S. should “finish the job.” But he also insists that continued attacks do not mean a return to war or long-term action.The confusion and uncertainty in Trump’s mixed messaging and his approval of back-to-back military strikes leave major questions about what comes next in the conflict, just weeks after difficult diplomacy to reach even an initial deal between the longti...

item.title: How to watch France vs Morocco: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Kylian Mbappe and Co. set for quarter-final test
item.description: Here's how to watch France vs Morocco for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as Les Bleus face the Atlas Lions in the quarter-finals.

item.title: Elon Musk says X will message you if a post you interacted with gets corrected
item.description: The owner of the everything app announced that it will start sending unsolicited DMs about corrected community notes to users.

item.title: French Fry Day 2026 deals: Score free fries from McDonalds, Five Guys, Sheetz, Chick-Fil-A, and more
item.description: National French Fry Day 2026 falls on July 10 and over a dozen fast food chains are offering free fries, including McDonald's Chick-Fil-A, Sheetz, and more.

item.title: OpenAI is looking for a 'Subject Matter Expert in Investment Banking' — could ChatGPT be set to replace bankers next?
item.description: OpenAI is hiring for n Investment Banking Subject Matter Expert to help identify high-value AI opportunities in the finance sector.

item.title: The 1X Neo Robot Has Freaky Fast Fingers
item.description: The soft, weirdly sexualized home-chore robot has been given some very tactile hands.

item.title: How to watch Big Brother 28: Free Streams & TV Schedule
item.description: Here's how to watch Big Brother 28 for free from anywhere, with host Julie Chen Moonves anchoring a 'Time Trip'-themed season of the reality show.
